'''ngapava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beaconing|beaconing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beaconing|beaconing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngapava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæpævæth|ngæpævæth]] || [[word:ngæpævæj|ngæpævæj]] || [[word:ngæpævæsh|ngæpævæsh]] || [[word:ngæpævæ|ngæpævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngapapavath|ngapapavath]] || [[word:ngapapavaj|ngapapavaj]] || [[word:ngapapavash|ngapapavash]] || [[word:ngapapava|ngapapava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngapavath|ngapavath]] || [[word:ngapavaj|ngapavaj]] || [[word:ngapavash|ngapavash]] || [[word:ngapava|ngapava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngapafvath|ngapafvath]] || [[word:ngapafvaj|ngapafvaj]] || [[word:ngapafvash|ngapafvash]] || [[word:ngapafvaf|ngapafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngapavatha|ngapavatha]] || [[word:ngapavaja|ngapavaja]] || [[word:ngapavasha|ngapavasha]] || [[word:ngapavaka|ngapavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngapavath|ngapavath]] || [[word:ngapavaj|ngapavaj]] || [[word:ngapavash|ngapavash]] || [[word:ngapava|ngapava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngapavathal|ngapavathal]] || [[word:ngapavajal|ngapavajal]] || [[word:ngapavashal|ngapavashal]] || [[word:ngapavakal|ngapavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngapavathatha|ngapavathatha]] || [[word:ngapavajaja|ngapavajaja]] || [[word:ngapavashasha|ngapavashasha]] || [[word:ngapavaka|ngapavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngapavathan|ngapavathan]] || [[word:ngapavajan|ngapavajan]] || [[word:ngapavashan|ngapavashan]] || [[word:ngapavakan|ngapavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngapavathaoro|ngapavathaoro]] || [[word:ngapavajaoro|ngapavajaoro]] || [[word:ngapavashaoro|ngapavashaoro]] || [[word:ngapavakaoro|ngapavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
